comments.author: @waltdoyleprojects3544
comments.text: The earth is approximately 6,000 years old… not millions… we have proof of the 6000 and the “millions” is just theory…

replies.author: @truehorizons66
replies.text: Thank you for sharing your perspective. We understand that people may view Earth's history in different ways depending on their beliefs and sources of information. We are happy and grateful that you watched our video. Subscribe to our channel so you don't miss the latest videos.
